steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0813.105114.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Click 'Export table data to file' button
Verify: success alert is shown after exporting
Get all transactions displayed in the UI table
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Read and parse transactions from Excel file: downloads/transactions-export.xlsx
